description_long: This is a minimalist, modern platform bed frame constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern. The bed features a solid, rectangular headboard and a low-profile frame with clean, straight edges. The sleeping surface is flat and unadorned, with three visible slots or seams running lengthwise, likely for mattress ventilation or support. The bed stands on four short, sturdy legs, two of which are metallic and angled, providing stability and a subtle contrast to the wood. There is no visible mattress or bedding, emphasizing the bare, functional design. The overall aesthetic is simple and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or modern living spaces.
description: A minimalist, light wood platform bed frame with a solid headboard and metallic legs, featuring a clean, modern design and no visible mattress.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid, rectangular headboard and the flat, unadorned frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the headboard, and the metallic legs at the foot.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the flat sleeping surface with three lengthwise seams and the full rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headboard and the metallic legs at the foot, mirroring view 1.
